use_cases: Displaying weekly schedules in a radial clock-like layout for intuitive time visualization
Allowing users to select and view specific days within a week using radial navigation
Scheduling appointments and events in a visually appealing circular week format
Managing time blocks and availability across a 7-day period with interactive elements
ai_summary: A radial week view calendar component that displays a 7-day week in a circular clock-like arrangement, enabling users to visualize and manage their weekly schedule. Features interactive day selection and time-based navigation with a modern minimalist aesthetic suitable for productivity and scheduling applications.
